_comment: Pinned metadata for the project-local, CLI-only LibreOffice runtime used by the Convert-to-PDF tool. Tracked in git; the downloaded/extracted runtime under .tools/libreoffice/ is git-ignored. Checksums are the official DocumentFoundation .sha256 sidecar values. Provisioning uses an official administrative extraction (msiexec /a) - no system install, PATH, registry, shortcut, or service changes.
